text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it's no good. How am I even<n>supposed to
practice being sincere?
choice_data_list:
(She's trying to practice how to be more
sincere?)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that reminds me of the<n>advice Tamamo
Cross gave her<n>when they were discussing
what to<n>get Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So Narita Taishin's going to repay<n>Super
Creek's kindness by<n>expressing her feelings
more<n>sincerely? That's pretty<n>commendable.
choice_data_list: Do you need help with being sincere?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you butting in for?<n>This has
nothing to do with—wait,<n>were you eavesdropping
on me?
choice_data_list: Sorry, you seemed pretty vexed, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-as if! Ugh, you're so... I mean,really!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine! So what if I was struggling? You<n>actually
gonna help me out or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so you want to be more<n>sincere... That
could be quite the<n>endeavor.
choice_data_list:
I was thinking it'd be best to pair her up with her
best friends.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: H-her best friends? Like, BESTfriends?! Taishin thinks we'rebesties?! Waaah, I'm so happy!Ohhh, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, shut it already! Let's just get<n>this over with!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Expressing yourself is a part of being<n>sincere. So
to help you with that, I<n>consulted several quiz
books and<n>came up with...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Answer in Earnest: Hayahide's<n>Special True or
False Quiz!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin. Question number<n>one—true or false?
You have<n>previously attempted to eat an entire
extra-large serving of the cafeteria's<n>daily
special.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean, I was hungry...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Challenging yourself isimportant, but you mustn't push yourlimits too hard. Next time you take onsuch a task, invite me along too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Question number two—true or false?<n>You tend to
schedule your training<n>sessions for when there
aren't many<n>people around.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, there's nothing wrong with that,<n>but you'd
be at greater risk if you got<n>into an accident.
Always know when<n>to ask others for help. Next...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec. How many more of these<n>annoying
"life lessons" of yours do I<n>have to listen to?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, my turn! Ta-dah! Check it<n>out—it's a cat
cafe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Because, get this... Taishin really<n>wants to talk to
cats!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you on about?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're not fooling me! I saw you<n>hanging out
with your feline friend in<n>that shopping district
alley! You had a<n>whole conversation and
everything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha—?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you went quiet when people<n>came around! I
think it'd be good for<n>you to get comfy talking to
kitties<n>even when others are watching!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Y-you saw me?! Hang on, that<n>wasn't—I was
just talking to myself,<n>not the cat!
choice_data_list: That doesn't sound like a very sincere answer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right. If you're going to chat<n>with a cat,
you have do it with an<n>honest and open heart!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: An honest and open heart...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Forget this! It's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can be more<n>sincere or open or
whatever! It's<n>seriously making my skin crawl!
Dummies!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It seems you've finally<n>revealed the true
feelings hidden in<n>your heart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Did it ever feel like Creek was forcing<n>herself to
help you? Or going out of<n>her way?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they looked a little worn, and you<n>might hurt
yourself if they ripped, so I<n>mended them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: This is a super important time forme too, and I want us both to keeptraining and working hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I get it now... I just have to be honest<n>with her...
That's all there is to it.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hang on. If you already knew what I<n>needed to
do, why'd you make me<n>jump through so many
hoops?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I meeean, it's not every day we get<n>to see you
being honest! We couldn't<n>resist! Right,
Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grrr! You two are SO dead!
choice_data_list: You sure have some great friends.
You sure have some great friends.
Next time, let's get those two to be sincere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grrr! You two are SO dead!
choice_data_list: You sure have some great friends.
You sure have some great friends.
Next time, let's get those two to be sincere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
With friends like these... Ugh! First<n>they play me
like a fiddle, then they<n>rub in the salt!
choice_data_list: They got you your answer though, right?
They got you your answer though, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess they helped a little.

text_block_list.name: Hayahide and Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But only a little! You barely even<n>helped at all!
Geez...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, nice idea...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with you, Hayahide.<n>Question number
one—and remember,<n>be sincere.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
True or false? You think your hair<n>looks good
today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Wait, are you saying itdoesn't look good?!
